title: Create Nuka
description: A create project that adds nuka cola!
body:
### Create Nuka Cola

Ever wanted to bring the refreshing taste of Nuka Cola into your Create world? Now you can! This mod introduces a variety of Nuka Cola flavors, all crafted using the power of Create’s machinery. Whether you’re setting up a fully automated bottling plant or crafting each drink by hand, this mod brings a touch of the Fallout universe to your Minecraft experience.

_Mod does have JEI support_

**Core Features**

**🍾 Base Flavors**

Nuka Cola – The classic, timeless cola loved across the Wasteland!

Nuka Cola Quantum – The iconic, glowing blue variant with an extra kick!

**🍇 Croptopia Support (Optional but Recommended!)**

With Croptopia installed, you unlock additional fruit-based flavors, adding variety and complexity to your cola production:

Nuka Cola Raspberry – A sweet and tangy twist on the original formula.

Nuka Cola Blackberry – A deep, rich berry flavor for true connoisseurs.

Nuka Cola Sour – A zesty take on Nuka Cola, perfect for those who love a sharp bite!

Nuka Cola Fusion – A mysterious, high-energy blend coming soon!

**⚡ Upcoming Features (More Flavors and Food!)**

Nukashine – A highly potent beverage for those who need an extra boost in their adventures!

More Nuka Cola Variants – Expect even more flavors from the Fallout universe to make their way into the game.

Fallout-Themed Foods – Unique foods from the Wasteland to complement your cola.

Nuka Gum – A chewable treat with its own special properties!


**How to Make Nuka Cola**

Crafting your own Nuka Cola flavors is easy with Create! All recipes use the new Nuka Berry, a special ingredient essential for mixing up that signature Nuka taste. Every recipe requires a Mechanical Mixer.
